title: Rehab & Nursing Cleaning MA [Patient-Safe 2026]
description: Trusted rehab & nursing cleaning in MA. Patient-safe protocols, infection control. 22+ yrs, $2M insured. (978) 307-8107
aiSummary: Dory's Cleaning Services Inc. is a Massachusetts-based commercial healthcare facility cleaning company with more than 22 years of hands-on clinical experience. We serve 296 cities across Massachusetts, providing CDC and OSHA compliant environmental cleaning for medical offices, specialty clinics (cardiology, dental, urgent care, dialysis), ambulatory and outpatient facilities, surgery centers, rehabilitation and nursing facilities, assisted living, and healthcare administrative offices. Founded by Jeneva Thomas, $2,000,000 liability insurance. Services include infection control, ATP testing, terminal cleaning, COVID disinfection, biohazard cleanup, and 24/7 emergency response. Contact: (978) 307-8107 — based in Marlborough, MA 01752.

schemas.name: Rehab & Nursing Facilities
schemas.description: Comprehensive sanitation for rehabilitation centers, skilled nursing facilities, and long-term care environments across Massachusetts. Resident-safe protocols and infection prevention.

mainEntity.name: What does rehabilitation and nursing facility environmental cleaning from Dory's include?

acceptedAnswer.text: Our rehabilitation and nursing facility environmental cleaning includes resident room sanitation, therapy and treatment area disinfection, common area and dining room cleaning, restroom and shower room sanitation, hard floor care, high-touch surface disinfection throughout hallways and nurse stations, laundry area maintenance, and detailed compliance documentation. We adapt our protocols to accommodate 24/7 resident care schedules.

mainEntity.name: How often should a rehab or nursing facility be professionally cleaned?

acceptedAnswer.text: Rehabilitation and nursing facilities require daily cleaning at minimum due to the residential nature of care and vulnerable patient populations. Common areas, dining spaces, and therapy rooms often need multiple cleaning cycles per day. Dory's designs cleaning schedules around shift changes, meal times, and therapy sessions to minimize disruption to residents and staff.

mainEntity.name: What compliance standards does Dory's follow for rehab and nursing facilities?

acceptedAnswer.text: Dory's follows CMS Conditions of Participation, OSHA standards, CDC infection prevention guidelines for long-term care, EPA-registered disinfectant protocols, and Massachusetts Department of Public Health regulations for skilled nursing and rehabilitation facilities. Our cleaning logs and documentation support your facility's survey readiness and state inspection compliance.

mainEntity.name: Why should a rehab or nursing facility choose Dory's over a general environmental cleaning service?

acceptedAnswer.text: Rehab and nursing facilities serve vulnerable populations who live in the facility full-time, making environmental cleaning a direct patient safety issue. Dory's exclusively cleans healthcare facilities and has over 22 years of experience working around 24/7 care operations. Our staff understand infection prevention for immunocompromised residents, proper handling of isolation room cleaning, and the documentation your facility needs for CMS surveys and state inspections.

Professional Rehab & Nursing Facility Sanitation

Rehab & Nursing Facilities in Massachusetts

Comprehensive healthcare for rehabilitation centers, skilled nursing facilities, and long-term care environments across Massachusetts. Resident-safe protocols and infection prevention.

Call (978) 307-8107 Schedule Assessment

Key Takeaways

  • Rehabilitation and nursing facility cleaning focuses on infection control for vulnerable, long-stay patients.
  • Dory's handles resident rooms, therapy areas, dining and common spaces with high-touch disinfection and bloodborne-pathogen protocols.
  • Programs follow CDC and OSHA standards with ATP testing and compliance documentation for surveys.
  • Consistent, trained crews reduce healthcare-associated infection risk across the facility.
  • Provided by Dory's Cleaning Services Inc. — 22+ years clinical experience, $2M insured, serving 296 Massachusetts cities. Free facility assessment with 24-hour response: (978) 307-8107.

Rehabilitation centers and skilled nursing facilities require specialized healthcare that prioritizes patient safety, infection prevention, and regulatory compliance. Dory's Cleaning Services delivers thorough sanitation using resident-safe, low-toxicity products appropriate for recovering patients and long-term residents.

We understand the unique challenges of patient rooms, therapy areas, dining halls, common spaces, and specialized treatment rooms. Our team provides consistent sanitation that supports infection prevention while maintaining a clean, comfortable healing environment.

With 22 years of clinical experience, our staff is trained to work respectfully around patient schedules and therapy sessions, providing thorough cleaning with minimal disruption to recovery activities.

Service Details

What's Included

  • Patient Room & Bathroom Sanitation
  • Therapy & Rehabilitation Area Cleaning
  • Common Area & Dining Hall Sanitation
  • Nurse Station & Medication Area Disinfection
  • Handrail & Mobility Aid Cleaning
  • Laundry Room & Utility Cleaning
  • Resident-Safe Product Protocols
  • Compliance Documentation & Reporting
